While it has several discounts this year, dropping down from its usual going rate, today’s deal marks the return of the lowest price we have tracked for it this year. Only once before today have we seen this model go for less, and it’s now within just $13 of that price. You can also get this in black, and it’s down to $77 with a relatively lighter deal. Head below for more details.

items.title: Keep drinks + food chilled without the latter being wet in Ninja’s 45-quart FrostVault wheeled cooler for $250 at Amazon, more
items.summary:
Amazon is currently offering the Ninja FrostVault 45-Quart Wheeled Cooler down at $249.95 shipped. These days you can usually find it at $300, which is the only rate we’ve seen in 2026, while 2025 saw the costs drop further to $250, with two one-time falls lower to $238 and $236 that appeared during the July and October Prime Day events. The deal here is a solid $50 price slash from the typical tag, giving you the first shot we’ve seen to grab it for under $300 in 2026, which is also the best tracked price of this year yet. You can also find a number of the 30-quart variants starting from $230 here, or browse all of Ninja’s device and appliance deals in the official Amazon storefront here.

Down from a $47 full price these days, we’ve seen previous discounts only go as low as $35 over the past year. items.title: Just $21 today gets you this 20,000mAh 45W power bank with two built-in USB-C cables that double up as a handy lanyard
items.summary:
Baseus 20,000mAh 45W power bank with dual built-in USB-C cables

Buy for $21 (Reg. $40)

Apply ZRO7998T during checkout. Prime-exclusive discount.

What we love

This compact Baseus power bank packs a massive 20,000mAh battery inside, which is enough to top up your phone multiple times on the go. One of the highlights here is that it comes with two built-in USB-C cables instead of just one that we typically see on most battery packs these days. They double up has a lanyard to make it easier to carry this unit around, and you also get an LED panel to show you the remaining charge.

Usually you have to buy more bulbs than this to get in at roughly this per-bulb price point. Today’s offer let’s you grab a couple for less than $7 each. I’ve been using these particular bulbs in my office for well over a year now and have no complaints.
